# kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioHorizontalSpacingKey

**Global Variable**

A key to the horizontal component of the image buffer aspect ratio.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioHorizontalSpacingKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The horizontal spacing value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferPixelAspectRatioVerticalSpacingKey**: A key to the vertical component of the image buffer aspect ratio.
